scripts.cap:build: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:ios:run: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:android: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:android:run: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 npx cap run android
